user_prompt: I'm trying to add a default bit-rate good for our use, I've highlighted a line, fill it in for me with something, I don't even know what unit the API expects
agent_reply: `lame_set_brate()` expects **kilobits per second**, so `64` means 64 kbps, not bytes/sec.

For your current 16 kHz stereo 16-bit input, raw WAV is about 512 kbps, so 64 kbps MP3 is roughly an 8:1 reduction. A 10 minute recording should land around 4.8 MB before container/encryption overhead, instead of ~40 MB.
